supported_here: H35 lands the required docs-only decision packet after P23 and authorizes exactly one bounded-scalar runtime gate.
The authorized runtime scope is explicit: bounded frame locals, typed flag slots, same substrate, same opcode surface only.
R41 remains deferred and inactive after H35.
unsupported_here: H35 does not authorize restricted-Wasm, hybrid/planner, or broader compiler widening.
H35 does not reopen R29, F3, or future frontier review by wording alone.
disconfirmed_here: The expectation that H34 permanently forbids any later same-substrate runtime packet once F13 exposes a sharper bounded family question.
